dream.title: Live and Work in Paradise
dream.description: So I want to BUILD Web 4.0 through RADICAL GIVING all-day to PEOPLE while living in paradise. So more explanation: I want to own and live inside a beautiful home in Kailua, Oahu Hawaii on the hillside that overlooks Lanikai Beach where my family can experience paradise. Living there, I will work on headset every day where I can simply talk back and forth with my agentic tooling every day via a smart watch app (which allows me to hike mountains daily) and communicate my intent to help people all around the world through better information systems.
dream.capacity: I am working daily on Web 4.0 and I know how we get there now. I am not scared for our children or the future anymore. I have chosen the new frontier as my future. This is manifest destiny. I will CREATE EVERYONES DREAM so my dream itself will come to life.
